channel.title: markdown on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in markdown on SoundsBrown

item.title: Hugo
item.description: References https://gohugo.io/getting-started/quick-start/ https://therealmjp.github.io/posts/hello-hugo/ https://gohugo.io/hosting-and-deployment/hosting-on-github/ Site setup Install the EXTENDED VERSION to enable customization of the Hermit theme! Commands: hugo new site soundsbrown cd soundsbrown git init git submodule add https://github.com/Track3/hermit.git themes/hermit echo theme = “hermit” >> config.toml hugo new posts\hello.md hugo hugo server -D Some settings need to be copied from themes/hermit/exampleSite/config.toml to your own config.toml Structure and syntax Markdown cheat sheet: https://github.com/adam-p/markdown-here/wiki/Markdown-Cheatsheet
